extraction.ocr_text:
Create New

Start building
Choose how you’d like to begin

Agentic Process
Orchestrate end-to-end processes with AI agents, robots and people.

Agent
AI powered digital worker leveraging LLMs, context, and automation tools to accomplish its goal.

RPA Workflow
Automate repetitive tasks using robotic process automation.

API Workflow
Create workflows that integrate with external services and APIs.

App
Create low-code apps for data manipulation, decision approval, and process control.
extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web with the Start building modal open after clicking Create New. The modal lists available component types to create, including Agentic Process, Agent, RPA Workflow, API Workflow, and App. The Agent option is visually highlighted, indicating the lesson step is to create a new conversational agent.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the Create New button in the top-right corner.
2. In the Start building dialog, click on Agent.
